name: My Top Bodyguard
original_name: អង្គរក្សផ្ទាល់បេះដូង
overview: Din was locked in the house by his father because of concerns for his safety. His father also hired a bodyguard named Putthi to protect him both inside and outside the house. Din loves dancing; he practices dancing at home and enjoys using social media. He also likes watching inappropriate videos and often asks Putthi to kiss and sleep with him...

trailers.title: ( BL Series ) រឿង « អង្គរក្សផ្ទាល់បេះដូង - My Top Bodyguard »
